title: Conserve forage
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conserve forage demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for forage conservation

pcs.text: Confirm forage conservation options from production plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm forage conservation options from production plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm forage conservation options from production plan.

pcs.text: Identify risk factors for spoilage in forage conservation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify risk factors for spoilage in forage conservation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify risk factors for spoilage in forage conservation.

pcs.text: Confirm paddock conditions for suitable forage production
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm paddock conditions for suitable forage production?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm paddock conditions for suitable forage production.

pcs.text: Prepare machinery and equipment or technology for forage production according to production plans and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare machinery and equipment or technology for forage production according to production plans and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare machinery and equipment or technology for forage production according to production plans and biosecurity procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure clear access to paddocks for harvesting and transport machinery
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure clear access to paddocks for harvesting and transport machinery?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure clear access to paddocks for harvesting and transport machinery.

pcs.text: Prepare storage facility for selected forage conservation method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare storage facility for selected forage conservation method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare storage facility for selected forage conservation method.

pcs.text: Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety policies, including selection of personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety policies, including selection of personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify work health and safety hazards, assess risks and implement controls according to workplace health and safety policies, including selection of personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for forage conservation

elements.title: Prepare paddocks for forage conservation

pcs.text: Close paddock to stock access according to production plan

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Close paddock to stock access according to production plan.

pcs.text: Report growth stage of crop for harvest to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report growth stage of crop for harvest to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report growth stage of crop for harvest to supervisor.

pcs.text: Monitor paddock for pest control and biosecurity for threats to forage bulk and quality

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor paddock for pest control and biosecurity for threats to forage bulk and quality.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare paddocks for forage conservation

elements.title: Make forage

pcs.text: Implement work health and safety procedures for forage conservation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement work health and safety procedures for forage conservation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement work health and safety procedures for forage conservation.

pcs.text: Monitor weather conditions affecting forage harvest
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather conditions affecting forage harvest?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather conditions affecting forage harvest.

pcs.text: Identify and assess moisture content of forage material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess moisture content of forage material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess moisture content of forage material.

pcs.text: Mow, condition, tedder and rake swaths according to weather conditions and forage drying targets

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mow, condition, tedder and rake swaths according to weather conditions and forage drying targets.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor harvest equipment for mechanical performance and resolve, repair or report wear or damage according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Load and transport forage safely to forage storage site according to storage plan.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place forage into storage facility to minimise spoilage and potential fire risk.
